commitMessage: Added new snap-area for portrait top/bottom (#1675)

other._0:
switch self {
        case .leftTopBottomHalf, .rightTopBottomHalf, .halves:
            return [.portrait, .landscape]
        case .portraitThirdsSide, .portraitTopBottomHalves:
            return [.portrait]
        case .thirds, .topSixths, .bottomSixths, .fourths:
            return [.landscape]
        }

switch self {
        case .leftTopBottomHalf, .rightTopBottomHalf, .halves:
            return [.portrait, .landscape]
        case .portraitThirdsSide, .portraitTopBottomHalves:
            return [.portrait]
        case .thirds, .topSixths, .bottomSixths, .fourths:
            return [.landscape]
        }

switch self {
        case .leftTopBottomHalf, .rightTopBottomHalf, .halves:
            return [.portrait, .landscape]
        case .portraitThirdsSide:
            return [.portrait]
        case .thirds, .topSixths, .bottomSixths, .fourths:
            return [.landscape]
        }

switch self {
        case .leftTopBottomHalf, .rightTopBottomHalf, .halves:
            return [.portrait, .landscape]
        case .portraitThirdsSide:
            return [.portrait]
        case .thirds, .topSixths, .bottomSixths, .fourths:
            return [.landscape]
        }
